orb_trade_setup.reason: Gap down GAP_DOWN: trade short below range low 23826

latest_news.headline: Uncle Sam is wrong, India and China are doing their bit to fight climate change
latest_news.body: It is true that there is an increase in carbon emission by India and China due to homegrown consumption and lack of infrastructure. But let#39;s keep in mind that India#39;s carbon emissions per capita are still 10 times lower and China#39;s is half of that compared to the US.

latest_news.headline: US stocks today: S&P 500, Nasdaq close at records on tech lift, Iran peace talk hopes
latest_news.body: The S&P 500 and Nasdaq reached record highs Friday, fueled by optimism for U.S.-Iran peace talks and a surge in Intel shares. Semiconductor stocks continued their rally, with Intel hitting a record. Attention now shifts to the upcoming Federal Reserve meeting for clues on interest rate cuts.

latest_news.headline: Promoters Buying: 9 Nifty 500 stocks that saw stake hikes in March quarter
latest_news.body: Promoters are showing increased confidence in several Nifty 500 companies. Their shareholding has risen in the March 2026 quarter compared to the December 2025 quarter. This trend suggests optimism about future company performance. Investors may find this a positive indicator. Companies like Godrej Properties and Adani Energy Solutions are among those with increased promoter stakes.

latest_news.headline: US stocks: Nuclear reactor maker X-Energy valued at $11.9 billion in stellar Nasdaq debut
latest_news.body: X-Energy's Nasdaq debut saw shares surge 30.9%, valuing the Amazon-backed nuclear reactor developer at $11.9 billion. The company raised over $1 billion in its IPO, aiming to deploy its small modular reactors to power AI infrastructure and meet carbon-free energy goals. This marks a significant capital milestone for X-Energy's ambitious plans.

latest_news.headline: Avis stock's roller coaster drags US' big index Dow Jones Transportation Average along for the ride
latest_news.body: Avis Budget shares experienced a dramatic 70% plunge, following a massive surge, highlighting meme stock exuberance. This volatility significantly impacted the Dow Jones Transportation Average, a long-standing economic barometer, revealing limitations of its price-weighted structure compared to market-value-weighted indexes.

latest_news.headline: JioStar logs Rs 3,210 crore profit in FY26 aided by growth in digital, sports
latest_news.body: JioStar reported a significant net profit of Rs 3,210 crore for FY26, with operating revenue reaching Rs 31,048 crore. The entertainment arm also saw strong performance in the March 2026 quarter, with 810 million viewers on its TV channels and 500 million monthly active users on JioHotstar.

latest_news.headline: Reliance Jio IPO soon? Here's what Mukesh Ambani said on India's largest listing plans
latest_news.body: Mukesh Ambani said Jio Platforms IPO plans are advancing, marking a key milestone. Strong growth, rising ARPU and subscriber gains support valuation, with the listing expected to unlock value and become one of India’s largest offerings.

latest_news.headline: Reliance Retail growth steady as quick commerce drives expansion
latest_news.body: Reliance Retail Ventures Ltd posted modest profit growth as heavy investments in quick commerce impacted margins, despite strong revenue gains. Rapid expansion in hyperlocal delivery, FMCG and store network supported scale, positioning the company for long-term growth and deeper market penetration.

latest_news.headline: Reliance Industries Q4 Results: Profit falls 13% YoY as energy margins weaken; Jio and retail shine
Intel stock surges 24% as AI-driven CPU demand fuels turnaround
latest_news.body: Intel’s shares surged over 24% after strong AI-driven demand for its CPUs led to better-than-expected results, even prompting sales of previously written-off chips. The rally lifted its market value past $416 billion and boosted peers like AMD and Arm, as optimism grows around CPUs regaining importance in AI workloads.

latest_news.headline: Justice Department drops criminal probe of Fed chair Powell, likely clearing way for Warsh
latest_news.body: The Justice Department has concluded its investigation into Federal Reserve chair Jerome Powell. This decision removes a significant obstacle to the confirmation of Kevin Warsh, President Trump's nominee. The probe focused on the Fed's building renovations. Prosecutors found no evidence of criminal conduct. A judge had previously dismissed subpoenas. This development could lead to a swift Senate vote for Warsh.

latest_news.headline: Reliance Retail Q4 Results: Cons PAT rises marginally YoY to Rs 3,563 crore; revenue up 11%
latest_news.body: Reliance Retail Q4 Results: Reliance Retail Ventures reported a steady Q4FY26, with net profit inching up 0.5% YoY to Rs 3,563 crore and revenue rising 11% to Rs 87,344 crore. EBITDA grew 3.1% to Rs 6,921 crore, while margins softened. Store count, customer base and hyper-local commerce volumes saw strong expansion during the quarter.

latest_news.headline: Reliance Jio Q4 Results: Cons PAT jumps 13% YoY to Rs 7,935 crore, revenue rises 13%; ARPU climbs to Rs 214
latest_news.body: Reliance Jio Q4 Results: Jio Platforms reported a 13% year-on-year increase in its March quarter consolidated net profit, reaching Rs 7,935 crore. Revenue also saw a 13% jump to Rs 38,259 crore, driven by organic ARPU growth and scaling of home connects. EBITDA grew 18% to Rs 20,060 crore, with margins expanding to 52.4%.

latest_news.headline: Reliance Industries Q4 Results: Profit falls 13% YoY to Rs 16,971 crore; revenue rises 13%
latest_news.body: Reliance Industries Q4 Results: Reliance Industries saw its net profit drop 13% year-on-year in the fourth quarter of fiscal 2026. Revenue, however, climbed 13%. The company's oil-to-chemicals segment faced cost pressures. Reliance Jio and Reliance Retail showed strong growth. JioStar also delivered robust performance, highlighting diverse business strengths.

latest_news.headline: GIFT Nifty jumps 110 points on Iran-US peace talk hopes; Nifty seen reclaiming 24K on Monday
latest_news.body: GIFT Nifty surged 110 points on hopes of renewed Iran-US peace talks, boosting sentiment after weak markets. Positive global cues could help Nifty 50 reclaim 24,000 despite recent declines driven by IT-led selling pressure.

latest_news.headline: US stocks today: S&P 500 and Nasdaq rise on fresh hopes of US-Iran talks, Intel boost
latest_news.body: Intel's significant profit surge is propelling technology stocks higher, nearing an all-time high for the S&P 500. Meanwhile, oil prices remain volatile as markets await developments in the Iran conflict. Procter & Gamble also reported strong earnings, while Charter Communications saw a notable decline.

latest_news.headline: Indian bonds post first weekly decline in three as oil resumes upward journey
latest_news.body: Indian government bonds were little ​changed on Friday, but ​posted their first weekly decline since April 3, as ​oil prices started climbing again, with market participants seeing no resolution to the U.S.-Iran conflict.

latest_news.headline: GE Vernova among 7 mid-cap stocks that hit 52-week highs & rallied up to 30% in a month
latest_news.body: Despite a 999-point drop in the BSE Sensex, seven BSE 150 midcap stocks hit 52-week highs, signalling strong momentum in select sectors, with notable gains in power, finance, steel and pharmaceuticals over the past month.

latest_news.headline: Gainers & Losers: Infosys, Adani Energy among 7 big movers on Friday
latest_news.body: Indian markets fell sharply with BSE Sensex and Nifty 50 declining amid heavy IT selling. Stocks like Infosys dropped, while select firms including Himadri Speciality Chemical and Adani Energy Solutions gained on earnings and momentum.

latest_news.headline: Sebi clears 4 IPOs including Yatayat Corporation and EAAA India Alternatives
latest_news.body: Sebi has approved IPOs for four firms spanning logistics, alternatives, real estate and manufacturing. Companies aim to tap rising demand across sectors, though competitive pressures, cyclicality and evolving investor preferences may shape their growth and market reception.
